title: alyssoides utriculata var. utriculata
intro: Alyssoides utriculata var. utriculata, also known as the cluster Alyssum or cluster alyssum, is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and antispasmodic properties, which help to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Alyssoides utriculata var. utriculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
